results.title: Former Blue Jays all-star getting the VIP treatment from Colorado Rockies
results.description: Former Toronto all-star Jordan Romano has quickly was installed as Colorado's closer after being cut by the LA Angels earlier this season.

results.title: BBC finally set for change to World Cup coverage after backlash from viewers
results.description: The BBC's coverage of the World Cup so far has been from a studio in Salford, and there will now be a change from the semi-final onwards

results.title: Wimbledon 2026: Sinner sweeps into semi-finals as Zverev overcomes curfew delay to reach last eight
results.description: Defending champion Jannik Sinner clinical straight-sets victory over Jan-Lennard Struff secured his place in the Wimbledon 2026 semi-finals while Alexander Zverev overcame a strict 11 p.m. curfew delay to advance to his first career quarter-final in SW19.

results.title: Russia Cleared to Host International Sports Events After IOC Decision, ROC Says
results.description: The Russian Olympic Committee (ROC) has announced that Russia has regained the right to host international sporting events, ROC President Mikhail Degtyarev said on his Telegram channel. ROC Says IOC Has Lifted Hosting Restrictions Degtyarev wrote that the International Olympic Committee (IOC) had lifted its ban on holding international competitions in Russia. At the same time, he noted that the IOC emphasized that decisions on staging events and sporting competitions in Russia, inviting Russian sports officials, and permitting the display of Russian national symbols would remain at the discretion of each international federation. Restrictions on Russian Athletes Also Eased Degtyarev also stated that the requirement to assess Russian athletes for neutral status had been removed.

results.title: Defending champion Jannik Sinner sweeps into Wimbledon semi-finals with victory over Struff
results.description: World No.1 Jannik Sinner reached the 2026 Wimbledon semi-finals with a straight-sets victory over Jan-Lennard Struff. He saved a crucial set point to seal a 7-5, 7-6, 6-3 win on Court 1 in just two and a half hours.

results.title: This is Porterville, This Is America: Record breaking Freedom Fest
results.description: Thousands of residents packed the Porterville Sports Complex on Friday night for the city's annual Freedom Fest, enjoying food, games, live entertainment, a first-ever drone show, and a fireworks spectacular the city says drew the largest crowd in the event's...

results.title: IOC Eases Restrictions on Russians Before 2028 as Anthem, Flag Ban Remains
results.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) on Tuesday lifted restrictions on Russian athletes allowing them to compete in team events and in qualifying competitions for the 2028 Olympic Games in Los Angeles. However, the IOC, meeting in Lausanne, kept in place the ban on the Russian national anthem being played and the flag being displayed, for the time being, but stipulated returning Russian athletes would have to pass "multiple" doping tests before being allowed to participate.
